components.materialMaterials: Diamond dust worth 100 gp, which the spell consumes.

lore.shortDescription: Grants resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.
lore.fullText: This spell turns the flesh of a willing creature you touch as hard as stone. Until the spell ends, the target has resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.
